title: Fox: There's Still Upside In This Great Communications Company
text: I've written about Fox a few times in the past, calling it an undervalued communications business. The company has plenty of upside both in its fundamentals and its potential growth. There are some concerns on the dynamics side of things, but these shouldn't hinder the thesis.

title: Tubi's Just Getting Started. Should You Buy Fox Stock Now?
text: The ad-supported streaming service is in the exact right place at the exact right time.

title: This Fox-Owned Gem Is Seeing Huge Growth
text: We're talking 25% growth in ad revenue despite an uncertain macroeconomic environment.

title: Catalyst Watch: CPI, Applied Materials, Super Bowl On Fox (Podcast)
text: FotografieLink/iStock via Getty Images Listen on the go! Subscribe to Wall Street Breakfast on Apple Podcasts and Spotify Catalyst watch for the week of February 12.

title: Biden Super Bowl interview is back on, Fox Corp. says
text: NEW YORK (AP) — After a day of mixed signals, President Joe Biden will be sitting down for a pregame interview for the Super Bowl, which is being broadcast by Fox on Sunday.

title: Fox quarterly revenue up 4% as earnings are boosted by World Cup, NFL
text: Fox said its advertising revenue rose about 4% in the fiscal second quarter, driven by World Cup, NFL, political advertising, and ad-supported streaming service Tubi.

title: Fox Corporation (FOX) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Start Time: 08:30 January 1, 0000 9:12 AM ET Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOX ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call February 08, 2023, 08:30 AM ET Company Participants Lachlan Murdoch - Executive Chair and CEO John Nallen - COO Steve Tomsic - CFO Gabrielle Brown - Chief IRO Conference Call Participants Robert Fishman - MoffettNathanson Jessica Reif Ehrlich - Bank of America Securities Phil Cusick - JPMorgan Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Doug Mitchelson - Credit Suisse John Hodulik - UBS Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Fox Corporation Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Fox beats Q2 estimates as World Cup powers earnings
text: Chief Executive Officer Lachlan Murdoch said the results were aided by "a compelling fall sports schedule, combined with an active midterm political news cycle."
